title: llm/skills project configuration
description: Project-level configuration for the llm/skills Composer plugin, stored at <project-root>/skills.json. When present, this file shadows the inline extra.skills block in composer.json. See https://github.com/roxblnfk/skills for full documentation.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for IDE/editor support. Ignored by the mapper.

target.description: Destination directory for synced skills, relative to the project root. Default: .agents/skills.

aliases.description: Additional paths created as symlinks (POSIX) or junctions (Windows) pointing at the target. Each entry must be a non-empty string. No entry may equal target or duplicate another entry (after lexical normalisation).

trusted.description: Packages or vendor patterns allowed to ship skills into this project. Each pattern is either an exact name like "vendor/package" or a wildcard like "vendor/*". Bare vendor names (no slash) are rejected.

trusted-replace.description: When true, the project's trusted list completely replaces both the built-in trusted vendors and the implicit direct-dependency trust. Default: false (project list extends the implicit sources).

discovery.description: When true, packages without an explicit extra.skills.source block are still considered as donors if they ship a top-level skills/ directory. CLI --discovery overrides this.

auto-sync.description: When true (default), the plugin runs skills:update automatically after every composer install/update via post-install-cmd / post-update-cmd. Suppressed by --no-scripts.

external-target.description: When true, target may resolve outside the project root. Default: false keeps target writes contained inside the project root.

local.description: Per-local-provider on/off toggles. Keys must come from the locked vocabulary (composer, npm, go). Absent keys fall back to per-provider defaults: composer enabled, others disabled until their provider implementation lands.

composer.description: Enable the Composer/Packagist local donor provider. Default: true.

npm.description: Enable the npm local donor provider (future). Default: false.

go.description: Enable the Go modules local donor provider (future). Default: false.

remote.description: Explicit remote donor refs. Each entry tells the remote provider what to fetch and from where: an adapter id in `from`, an identifier in `package` or `url`, and optional `host`/`ref`/`skills`/adapter-specific extras.

remoteByPackage.description: Remote entry for name-based adapters (github, gitlab, bitbucket, composer, npm, go, skills.sh).

host.description: Full URL of the registry / API host (private Packagist, GitHub Enterprise, self-hosted GitLab, …). Absent → adapter default.

ref.description: Adapter-specific version pin (^1.2.3, v1.2.3, main, full SHA). Absent → adapter resolves the latest stable tag, falling back to the default branch HEAD.

skills.description: Optional allowlist of skill directory names to sync from this donor. Absent / omitted → sync every skill the donor ships. A non-empty list keeps only those skills. An empty list ([]) keeps the donor registered but pulls no skills from it (useful for staging or a temporary opt-out without deleting the entry). Names that do not exist in the fetched archive surface as -v warnings without aborting the run.

remoteByUrl.description: Remote entry for URL-only adapters (http, zip).

skills.description: Optional allowlist of skill directory names to sync from this donor. Absent / omitted → sync every skill the donor ships; empty list → donor is registered but no skills are pulled (matches `remoteByPackage` semantics).
